zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas de Longford IV於大約1372年出生在英國德比夏爾隆福德時，他的父親Nicholas de Longford III22歲，母親Margaret De Appleby29歲。他和Alice Cockayne至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1416年9月在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德享年45歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾隆福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas de Longford IV于大约1372年出生在英国德比夏爾隆福德时，他的父亲Nicholas de Longford III22岁，母亲Margaret De Appleby29岁。他和Alice Cockayne至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1416年9月在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德享年45岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾隆福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas de Longford IV was born about 1372, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas de Longford III, was 22 and his mother, Margaret De Appleby, was 29. He had at least 1 son with Alice Cockayne. He died about September 1416, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Longford, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas de Longford IV est né environ 1372, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Longford III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Appleby, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alice Cockayne. Il est décédé environ septembre 1416, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas de Longford IV um 1372 in Longford, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Longford III 22 und seine Mutter Margaret De Appleby 29. Er hatte mit Alice Cockayne mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um September 1416 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Longford, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Longford IV è nato il circa 1372 nel Longford, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas de Longford III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Appleby, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alice Cockayne. Morì circa settembre 1416, nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Longford, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Longford IVが約1372年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Longford IIIは22歳，母Margaret De Applebyは29歳であった。彼はAlice Cockayneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1416年9月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで45歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Longford IV(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Longford III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Appleby(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Alice Cockayne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1416년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 론그퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Longford IV nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Longford III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Appleby, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alice Cockayne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente setembro de 1416, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas de Longford IV родился около 1372 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Longford III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Appleby, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice Cockayne. Он умер около сентябрь 1416 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas de Longford IV nació aproximadamente 1372, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Longford III, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret De Appleby, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Alice Cockayne. Murió aproximadamente septiembre de 1416, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
